name: Shining Victory Motor Electronic Co., Ltd.
summary: Shining Victory Motor Electronic Co., Ltd. engages in the production and sale of automotive components. It offers optoelectronic products, automotive electronics, and automotive metal and plastic decorative parts, including car door illuminating welcome pedals, car interior light bar ambient lights, shifting atmosphere lights, sun visors, luggage racks, bright strips, etc. The company is based in George Town, the Cayman Islands.
